name: Incremental Island
short_description: Build and expand a vibrant civilization on a procedurally generated island. Trade and conquer with other island nations to grow your wealth.
detailed_description:
Demo Available: Download the demo from the demo button on this page.



Game Overview: This is a clicker game inspired by CivClicker. Manage resources and develop your civilization. Each game features unique procedurally generated islands. Click on tiles to interact with resources and the environment. Gather and manage resources to expand your civilization. Trade and conquer with other island nations to grow your wealth.



First things: When you first start, click on the land tiles to collect and manage basic resources like food and wood. Early on, focus on constructing tents and huts to increase your population capacity. As resources flow in, begin to explore and unlock new tiles. Unlock the Port to explore the world...

Goal of the Game: Lead your island to victory by expanding your civilization, building an army, and conquering all other islands. Once you win, you can either keep playing in Freeplay mode or aim for a higher score in a new world.

Original Music: by Mike Langston
